question: How can I track my order?
answer: You can track your order by visiting sujith.com/track-order and entering your Order ID and registered email address. You will also receive SMS and email updates at key delivery milestones. Tracking starts within 24 hours of order dispatch.

question: What is Sujith's return policy?
answer: Sujith offers a 30-day hassle-free return policy for most items. Products must be unused, in original packaging, and accompanied by the invoice. Perishables, innerwear, and customized items are non-returnable. Initiate a return through the 'My Orders' section on our app or website.

question: How long does it take to receive a refund?
answer: Once your return is received and inspected, refunds are processed within 5–7 business days. For credit/debit card payments, the refund appears in your bank statement within 3–5 additional business days. UPI and wallet refunds are instant post-approval.

question: My order was delivered but I received the wrong item. What should I do?
answer: We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. Please report the issue within 48 hours via the 'Help & Support' section in your account, or call us at 1800-123-SHOP. We will arrange a reverse pickup and send the correct item at no additional charge.

question: Can I change or cancel my order after placing it?
answer: Orders can be modified or cancelled within 1 hour of placement. After that, the order enters processing and cannot be changed. To cancel, go to 'My Orders' > select the order > click 'Cancel Order'. For modifications, contact our support team immediately at 1800-123-SHOP.

question: What payment methods does Sujith accept?
answer: Sujith accepts Credit Cards, Debit Cards, Net Banking, UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), EMI options, Sujith Wallet, and Cash on Delivery (available for select pin codes). All transactions are secured with 256-bit SSL encryption.

question: My package shows as delivered but I haven't received it. What do I do?
answer: Please check with neighbors or your building's reception first. If still not found, report it within 24 hours via the 'Missing Package' option under 'My Orders'. Our team will investigate with the courier partner and either re-deliver or issue a full refund within 5 business days.

question: How do I update my delivery address?
answer: You can add or update delivery addresses in 'My Account' > 'Addresses'. If your order is already placed, you can update the address only if it hasn't been dispatched yet. Contact support immediately via chat or call to request an address change.

question: Is there customer support available on weekends?
answer: Yes! Sujith's customer support is available 7 days a week, including weekends and most public holidays, from 9 AM to 9 PM. You can reach us via live chat on the app/website, email at support@sujith.com, or phone at 1800-123-SHOP.

question: How do I raise a complaint about poor product quality?
answer: We're sorry to hear that! Please raise a quality complaint through 'My Orders' > select the product > 'Report an Issue' > 'Quality Problem'. Attach photos if possible. A customer support executive will contact you within 24 hours to resolve the issue.

question: Can I exchange a product instead of returning it?
answer: Yes, Sujith offers exchanges for size, color, or variant changes within 30 days of delivery for eligible products. Initiate an exchange from 'My Orders' > 'Exchange Item'. The exchanged product ships once the original is picked up.

question: What should I do if my payment was deducted but the order wasn't placed?
answer: Don't worry — this happens occasionally due to network timeouts. The deducted amount will be auto-refunded within 3–5 business days. If the refund is delayed, contact us at support@sujith.com with your transaction ID and we'll resolve it immediately.
